projectDescription: A full-stack offline-first PWA for managing water bill collection, community work (jornales), expenses, gamification, and AI-powered collection routing for rural water boards (Juntas de Acueductos) in Panama.
keyFeatures: Offline-First PWA — fully operational without internet using IndexedDB via Dexie.js
Multi-role RBAC — admin, cobrador, minsa, cliente, and dev roles with strict route guards
Six payment types — mensual, diario, parcial, multi-mes, adelanto, puesta_al_día
Gamification engine — points awarded for punctual payments and jornal attendance, redeemable as discounts
AI Collection Routing — risk scoring (0-100), smart visitation order, and delinquency prediction
Commission split system — auto-calculated 60/40 developer/collector split per payment
Official MINSA reports — one-click export to PDF (jsPDF) and multi-sheet Excel (xlsx)
Supabase cloud sync — pending-queue pattern that pushes local records on reconnection
Community forum (foro) — announcements and notices posted by admin/cobrador
SHA-256 file integrity hashing for uploaded payment receipts
publicApiSurface: registrarPago(userId, { tipo, monto, mesesTarget, nota }) — pagosService.js
calcularEstado(userId) — returns activo | parcial | moroso | corte
getResumenUsuario(userId) — returns { estado, deuda, mesesDeuda, adelantados, ultimoPago, totalPagos }
getDeudaTotal(userId) — returns total outstanding balance in balboas
getSugerenciaCobrador(usuarioTarget) — aiService.js, returns empathic message text
login(email, password) — authService.js, syncs Supabase + Dexie on success
logout() — clears session and local Dexie tables
getHomeRoute(role) — returns default redirect path for role
initDB() — seeds IndexedDB and migrates localStorage data
getConfig() / saveConfig(cfg) — reads/writes system config (cuotaMensual, mesesGraciaCorte, etc.)
